card.name: Agott
card.text: The first noncreature spell you cast on each of your turns costs {B} (or {1}) less and 1 life more to cast.

card.name: Coco
card.text: Prowess When Coco's power is 3 or greater, investigate. She becomes a Wizard and gains lifelink. This ability triggers only once. (To investigate, create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Qifrey
card.text: Flash Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Other creatures you control have prowess. When Qifrey enters, you may search your library for a card with mana value 1, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Tetia
card.text: Haste Encourage ({T}: Another target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Encourage only as a sorcery.) Whenever Tetia encourages a creature, that creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Portal Gun
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, exile up to one target creature or artifact, then return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control. If it's a creature you control, it enters attacking and gains flying until end of turn. Equip {2}

card.name: Gru, Despicable
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, create X 1/1 black Minion creature tokens with "This creature can't block", where X is the number of black mana symbols in that spell's mana cost. Whenever a creature you control dies, Gru connives. Then if he has power 10 or greater, you may cast the discarded card by paying 1 life rather then its mana cost. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on Gru.)

card.name: Minion CARL
card.text: This creature can't block

card.name: Kyubey
card.text: Bargain (You may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token as you cast this spell.) When Kyubey enters, draw a card. If it was bargained, you may instead put a card you own from outside the game into your hand.

card.name: Doctor Evil
card.text: Evil offspring {2}{B} (You may pay an additional {2}{B} as you cast this spell. If you do, when he enters, create a 1/1 token copy of him named Scott Evil.) One Million Dollars — When Doctor Evil enters, target opponent may discard a card, pay 3 life and have you create a Treasure token. If they don't, search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Madeline
card.text: Jump — During your turn, Madeline has flying. Double Jump — Whenever a Mountain you control enters, Madeline gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Golden Idol
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nontoken colorless permanent. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Doctor Edgar Zomboss
card.text: Deathtouch If you would discard a card, you may instead sacrifice a nonland permanent. {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Knowing Skull
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the amount of life you've lost this turn.

card.name: Magellan
card.text: Afflict 2 (Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 2 life.) Other creatures you control have afflict 2. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to an opponent, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Carrot
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast a spell with mana value greater then Carrot's power, put a number of +1/+1 counters on her equal to the difference.

card.name: The Saw Arlong
card.text: Menace When Arlong enters, for each non-Merfolk creature you don't control, that creature's controller sacrifices it unless they have you put a +1/+1 counter on Arlong and create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Impel Down Breakout
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each attacking creature you control. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. If it's your turn and it's the declare attackers step, that creature enters tapped and attacking.

card.name: Twin Sunflower
card.text: Defender When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. {T}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Problem Sleuth
card.text: When Problem Sleuth enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") When you draw your third card in a turn, Problem Sleuth becomes a 4/4 Angel creature with flying and vigilance.

card.name: Wanderer in a Strange Land
card.text: Warp {1}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this planeswalker at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.) [+1]: Create a 2/2 white Samurai creature token with vigilance. [-2]: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains double strike, vigilance, and indestructible until end of turn. [-2]: Exile another target nonland permanent until the Wanderer leaves the battlefield.

card.name: K.C. Cooper, Undercover
card.text: Sneak {U}{U} (You may cast this spell for {U}{U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. It enters tapped and attacking.) When K.C. enters, investigate. If you would draw one or more cards while K.C. is attacking, instead draw that many cards plus one, then discard a card.

card.name: Baby 5, Living Weapon
card.text: Baby 5 has first strike while attacking. When Baby 5 enters, arm her X times. (Create X colorless Equipment artifact tokens with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2}, then attach them to her.) Whenever an artifact you control enters, Baby Five deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: The Second Summer of Love
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Augmented — If you've spent {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} to cast spells this turn, your opponents untap only three permanents during their next untap step. Exile The Second Summer of Love.

card.name: Chell
card.text: As long as Chell is equipped, she has haste. When Chell enters, target creature can't block this turn. Warp {R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Mithrix, King of Nothing
card.text: When Mithrix enters, target opponent reveals their hand. You may exile a nonland permanent card from it. If you don't, exile up to one target nontoken nonland permanent card that player controls. Then create a token that's a copy of the exiled card. When Mithrix leaves the battlefield, return all cards exiled with him to their owner's hands.

card.name: Dora the Explorer
card.text: Whenever Dora attacks, create a Map token. (It's an artifact token. It says "I'm the map, I'm the map! Read my token to find out more!") Discard a card: Dora can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: The Transistor
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose one— • Exile target card from a graveyard. Equipped creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each card exiled with the Transistor. • You may pay {3}. If you do, equipped creature becomes a copy of a permanent card exiled with the Transistor until end of turn. Equip {1}

card.name: Bushidō
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Draw a card.

card.name: Richeh // Stubbornness
card.text:
Richeh enters prepared. (While she's prepared, you may cast a copy of her spell. Doing so unprepares her.) Richeh can't be blocked.
---
Counter target spell that targets you or a permanent you control.

card.name: Diable Jambe
card.text: Diable Jambe deals 2 damage to any target. Infusion — If you've gained life this turn, it deals 4 damage instead.

card.name: Void Fiend
card.text: Deathtouch Exhaust — {13}{B}{B}: Put three +1/+1 counters on Void Fiend. Each opponent loses 3 life, sacrifices a nonland permanent, and discards a card. If your life total is less than your starting life total, this ability costs {X} less to activate, where X is the difference. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: The Ironclad
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand. The Ironclad deals damage to you equal to its mana value. The Ironclad gets -X/-0, where X is your life total.

card.name: Autumn Rain Tashigi
card.text: Noncreature, non-Equipment spells cost {1} more to cast. When Tashigi enters, you may search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Iguin
card.text: Ward—Discard a card Flying Whenever a creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, you may choose one — • That creature has power and toughness 1/1 until end of turn. • You may pay life equal to that creature's power. If you do, put that many +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: The Cookie
card.text: Click — Tap an untapped artifact or creature you control: Add {C}. {5}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 7 life. Draw a card.

card.name: Turkor the Ungrateful
card.text: Haste When Turkor enters, you gain X life. Whenever you gain life,

card.name: Demonhead Mobster Kingpin
card.text: Undying (When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.) Flying When Demonhead Mobster Kingpin enters, you draw two cards and you gain 2 life. Each opponent discards a card and loses 2 life.

card.name: Plantera
card.text: Trample, reach Whenever Planterra enters or attacks, you may create a token that's a copy of target land you control.

card.name: Mammon, the Tower
card.text: Whenever Mammon enters or attacks, choose one— • Create five tapped Treasure tokens. • Mammon deals 5 damage to any target. • Discard your hand, then draw five cards.

card.name: Your Grandma
card.text: {T}, Tap an untapped creature, artifact, or land you control: Add one mana of any color. Exhaust — {2}{G}, {T}: Create a Food token. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Horror
card.text: More Mutation —When Horror enters, you get two rad counters. (At the beginning of your first main phase, for each rad, mill a card. For each nonland card milled this way, you lose 1 life and a rad.) Radiation Beam — When Horror attacks, you may exile a card in your graveyard put there from anywhere this turn. Create a copy of it. You may cast the copy. When you do, each player gets rad counters equal to its mana value.

card.name: Steroids
card.text: Inaccurate — Steroids must attack each combat. Dual Wielding — If an ability of an Equipment or Aura you control triggers, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Yung Venuz
card.text: Fire Faster — Haste Pop Pop! — Whenever you cast a Equipment spell or cast a spell that targets, you may discard a card. When you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for it.

card.name: Loop
card.text: Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then draw seven cards. Each player who did may put a permanent card from their hand onto the battlefield. Exile Loop.

card.name: Rebel
card.text: Can Spawn Allies — When this creature enters, create X 2/2 black Mutant tokens with decayed. You lose X life. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Portals Heal — Whenever a land you control enters, up to one target creature gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Kaho Reinol
card.text: Lands you control have spirited. (When that permanent enters, you may activate one of its activated abilities without paying its cost. Costs include {T}. Timing restrictions still apply.)

card.name: Alex Fierro, Child of Loki
card.text: You have Alex enter the battlefield as a copy of another creature you control, except she's named Alex Fierro, Child of Loki and has his other abilities. Menace When Alex deals combat damage to an opponent, you may exile her, then return him to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Poneglyph
card.text: {T}: Add {C} for each card type among cards in your graveyard. {3}, {T}: Mill three cards. You may return a card milled this way to your hand.

card.name: Donquixote Doflamingo
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When Doflamingo enters, gain control of up to one target nonland permanent you don't control. It's owner draws two cards, then discards a card.

card.name: Infinite Hyperdeath
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Channel — {1}{B}{B}, Discard this card: Destroy target creature.

card.name: The Kingsoul
card.text: When the Kingsoul enters, return target card from your graveyard to your hand. Lands you control have "{T}: Add {C}{C}."

card.name: The Hollow Knight
card.text: Ward {2} Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Lifelink When the Hollow Knight enters, exile another target nonland permanent until it leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Riptide
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, choose one. If it's a Hero, choose both instead. • Pen — Equipped creature can't be blocked this turn. • Sword — Journey two times. (Exile the top two cards of your library face up. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to an opponent, put a journeyed card you own into your hand.) Equip {1}

card.name: The Lightning Thief
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Gain control of up to one target creature or artifact for as long as you control this Saga. II, III — Draw two cards. At the end of each combat this turn, if you didn't attack, discard a card. ​

card.name: Percy Jackson, Son of the Sea
card.text: Waterbend {2}: Percy becomes a 2/2 Demigod Warrior. (While paying a waterbend cost, you can tap your artifacts and creatures to help. Each one pays for {1}.) Waterbend {4}: If Percy is a Warrior, he becomes a 4/4 Demigod Soldier with vigilance. Waterbend {8}: If Percy is a Soldier, he becomes a 8/8 Demigod Hero with "Whenever Percy attacks, untap all permanents you control."

card.name: Jason Grace, Hero of Olympus
card.text: Flash {1}, Sacrifice Jason: Choose one — • Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Henry Stickmin
card.text: Choose Your Own Adventure — If you would choose one or more modes, you may choose an additional mode. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on Henry for each mode chosen. (Modal spells and abilities are indicated by • listed modes.)

card.name: Ash Ketchum
Carmen Sandiego
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Target land you control is every basic land type until end of turn. {2}, {T}: Carmen connives. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on her.)

card.name: Lelouch vi Britannia // Command Geass
card.text:
Lelouch enters prepared. (While he's prepared, you may cast a copy of his spell. Doing so unprepares him.) The first instant or sorcery spell you cast each turn costs {X} less to cast, where X is Lelouch's power.
---
You control target opponent during their next turn.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Noble Rebel // Sorcery

card.name: C.C. the Witch
card.text: When C.C. enters, if she was cast, you may search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{B}, Discard two cards: Return C.C. from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: The Stone Mask
The Delorean
card.text: Whenever the Delorean attacks, you get an additional upkeep step after this phase. {3}, {T}: Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card. Put time counters on that card equal to it's mana value. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. (On your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If it's a creature, it has haste.) Crew 3

card.name: The Master Sword
card.text: When the Master Sword enters, exile another target nonland permanent until it leaves the battlefield. Equipped creature gets +5/+5 and has protection from the exiled card's colors. (It can't be targeted, dealt damage by, enchanted, or equipped by anything of that color.) Equip {10}. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: Peter and the Starcatchers
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 1/1 green Child creature token. II, III — Teach up to one target creature flying. (Put a flying counter on it. If it already has flying, put a +1/+1 counter on it instead.) ​

card.name: Sonic the Hedgehog
card.text: Haste When Sonic dies, create a tapped Treasure token. Boast—{1}{R}: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Battlefield
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, contest the top card of your library. (Exile it, then create a battle token with two defense that returns it to your hand on defeat. Choose an opponent to defend it.) {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}: If you've defeated a Battle this turn, contest the top card of your library.

card.name: Mammoth Mogul
card.text: When Mammoth Mogul enters, create a tapped Treasure token. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, you may choose one that hasn't been chosen yet — • Draw a card. • Create a 3/3 green Elephant creature token. • Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: GLaDOS
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifacts you control.) You may look at the top card of your library at any time. You may play cards from the top of your library.

card.name: All Might, One for All
card.text: Whenever All Might attacks or blocks, choose one that hasn't been chosen yet— • You gain 7 life. • Mill four cards. When you do, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Distribute four +1/+1 counters and a flying counter among other creatures you control • Destroy up to one target nonland permanent. Sacrifice All Might.

card.name: Himiko Toga
card.text: Decayed, haste (She can't block. When she attacks, sacrifice her at the end of combat.) You may have Toga enter as a copy of a creature you control, except her name is Himiko Toga and she has decayed and haste. Escape—{3}{R}, Exile four cards from your graveyard (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)

card.name: Seeker
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Seeker if that spell's mana value is even and your choice of a first strike, lifelink, or flying counter on her if that spell's mana value is odd. As long as Seeker has four or more counters on her, you can't lose the game and your opponents can't win the game.

card.name: REX
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, choose one or more— • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. You lose 1 life. • Target player adds {B}{G}. You lose 2 life. • Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. You lose 3 life.

card.name: The Part Where He Kills You
card.text: Improvise (Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.) The Part Where He Kills You — The Part Where He Kills You deals X damage to any target. "Well, this is the part where I kill you." —Wheatley

card.name: Fragmentation
card.text: As a additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Choose one — • Destroy target creature. • Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life.

card.name: Timber Hearth
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card. If you do, create a Lander token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.) {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Blood is Fuel, Hell Is Full
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Create a tapped Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Crazy Dave
Kujiwaka Rise // Navigate
card.text:
Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. Then prepare Rise if this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn.
---
Copy target triggered ability you control of a non-Performer source. You may choose new targets for the copy.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Performer Detective // Instant

card.name: Jumbo Josh
card.text: Trample Other creatures you control have base power and toughness 4/4 and are green in addition to their other colors. {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card that could produce green mana, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Fateful Descent
card.text: Mill three cards. When you do, you may return up to one target land card or card with mana value 4 or greater from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Dive
card.text: Surveil 1. You may play an additional land this turn. You may play land cards from your graveyard this turn.

card.name: A Moment, Fractured
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {W}. {2W}{2W}{2W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Exile target creature.

card.name: Proteus Shallows
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {U}. {2U}{2U}{2U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a 0/0 blue Leviathan creature and put a +1/+1 counter on it for each card in your graveyard. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: The Spire
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {R}. {2R}{2R}{2R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Untap target creature you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: City 17
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {B}. {2B}{2B}{2B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: You draw two cards and you lose 2 life.

card.name: The Moon
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {G}. {2G}{2G}{2G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If it's a nonland card with mana value 3 or less, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Atsuko Akko Kagari
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a Treasure token. Akko deals 1 damage to you for each Treasure you've created this turn. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Create The Shiny Arc, a legendary artifact Equipment token with "Whenever equipped creature attacks, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback {0} until end of turn." and equip {4}. Attach it to Akko.

card.name: Prismatic Vista
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice Prismatic Vista: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle your library.

card.name: Antares, Victoria Dallon
Map Token CARL
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Hoarder's Instincts
card.text: You may discard up to two cards. Create a Junk token for each card you've discarded this turn. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Giorno Giovanna
card.text: Lifelink, menace At the beginning of your end step, manifest the top card of your library. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the amount of life you've gained this turn. (To manifest a card, put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)

card.name: Leo Valdez, Hero of Olympus
card.text: When Leo enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a nonland card with an activated ability from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library at random.

card.name: The Argo II
card.text: Flying, double strike, vigilance {2}, {T}: Journey twice. (Exile the top two cards of your library face up. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to an opponent, put a journeyed card you own into your hand.) Crew 4

card.name: Reboot
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target noncreature spell. • Return target instant, sorcery, or artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Hazel Levesque, Hero of Olympus
card.text: Whenever Hazel attacks, you may exile a creature or artifact card from your graveyard. If you do, create a Treasure token and put a +1/+1 counter on her. Sacrifice two artifacts: Put a card exiled with Hazel into your hand.

card.name: Oracle's Visions
card.text: Each player mills two cards. Draw a card.

card.name: Reyna Ramírez-Arellano
card.text: Vigilance When Reyna enters, create a1/1 white Hero creature token. Battalion — Whenever Reyna and at least two other creatures attack, if it's not an extra combat, you may untap all tokens you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Annabeth Chase, Hero of Olympus
card.text: Whenever a card is put into your hand from anywhere, put a +1/+1 counter on Annabeth. (This includes drawing.) {T}: Add {C} equal to Annabeth's power. You can't spend this mana to cast spells that aren't artifacts, Demigods, or Heroes.

card.name: Tattletale, Lisa Wilbourn
card.text: Flash When Tattletale enters, each player reveals their hand. For each player, you may choose a nonland card revealed this way and shuffle it into their library. Then that player draws a card.

card.name: Grue, Brian Laborn
card.text: If a creature or artifact you don't control entering would cause an ability of that permanent to trigger, counter that ability unless its controller pays life equal to Grue's power. Power-up — {X}{B}{B}: Grue connives X. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each power-up ability only once. Reduce it's cost by his mana cost if he entered this turn.)

card.name: Skitter, Taylor Herbert
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a player was dealt combat damage this turn, you may draw a card. If you do, you lose 1 life. Power-up — {4}{B}: Create two 1/1 black green Insect creature tokens with flying. Put a +1/+1 counter on Skitter. (Activate each power-up ability once once. Reduce its cost by her mana cost if she entered this turn.)

card.name: Don Quixote of La Mancha
card.text: During combat, Don Quixote gets -2/-0 unless he's modified. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Bitch, Rachel Lindt
card.text: Other creatures you control have riot. (They enter with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.) Power-up — {3}{R}{R}: You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step unless it's a Dog or Wolf. Put a +1/+1 counter on Bitch. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each power-up ability only once. Reduce it's cost by her mana cost if she entered this turn.)

card.name: Descend into Pharloom
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Suppress Dissent
card.text: Counter target spell. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: The Abyss
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. {B}, {T}, Sacrifice the Abyss: The next spell you cast this turn gains delve. When you cast that spell, you lose life equal to it's mana value. (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)

card.name: Gunplay
card.text: When this enchantment enters, it deals 2 damage to any target. If a source you control would deal noncombat damage to a permanent or player, it deals that much damage plus 1

card.name: Faithless Wheeling
card.text: Draw two cards, then discard two cards. Create a tapped Junk token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Vin, Mistborn
card.text: Flying, vigilance Vin has the non-equip activated and triggered abilities of each artifact you control. Whenever Vin dies, if she dealt combat damage to a player this turn, return her to the battlefield.

card.name: Zaheer, Winds of Change
card.text: Flying Whenever Zaheer attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. Airbend that card, then shuffle. (Exile it. While it's exiled, you may cast it for 2 rather than its mana cost.) Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other then your hand, Zaheer deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Gather the Red Lotus
card.text: Airbend target creature card in your graveyard. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.) Escape {3}{B}{B}, Exile four other cards from your graveyard (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)

card.name: Mako and Bolin
card.text: Creatures you control with mana abilities have firebending 2. (Whenever that creature attacks, add {R}{R}. This mana lasts until end of combat.) {2}{R}{G}: Earthbend 2. Activate only during your turn. (To earthbend 2, target land you control becomes a 0/0 creature with haste that's still a land. Put two +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies or is exiled, return it to the battlefield tapped.)

card.name: Splendid Speckled Mosscap
card.text: When Mosscap enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a land or multicolored card from among them and put it into your hand, then shuffle. You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color.

card.name: Avatar's Will
card.text: Choose one— • Airbend target nonland permanent you control. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.) • Airbend target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less in your graveyard.

card.name: Emmet Brickowski
card.text: Master Builder — Other artifacts you control have modular 1. (They enter with a +1/+1 counter on them. When they die, you may put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature you control.) {T}: Add {C}. You can't spend this mana to cast nonartifact spells.

card.name: Constanze von Braunschbank
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 Construct artifact creature token or sacrifice an artifact to create a 3/3 Drone Vehicle artifact creature token with flying, decayed, and crew 2. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Diana Cavendish
The Seven Words of Arcturus
card.text: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card. Whenever another card leaves your graveyard, you may pay {U}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Deku, Izuku Midoriya
card.text: Training (Whenever this creature attacks with another creature with greater power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) Vigilance Whenever Deku deals 4 or more damage, draw a card to a single permanent or player.

card.name: Batgirl, Cassandra Cain
card.text: As long as Batgirl is attacking, she has first strike and deathtouch. When Batgirl enters, target opponent reveals their hand. You may exile a nonland card from it until she leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Spoiler, Stephanie Brown
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards, put that many +1/+1 counters on Spoiler. Boast—Discard a card: Mill cards equal to Spoiler's power. You may play a card milled this way until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Austin Powers, Man of Mystery
card.text: First strike, haster

card.name: Snow Miser
card.text: Menace Whenever Snow Miser attacks, choose up to one other target creature. If you control it, create a 1/1 token that's a copy of it, except it's a nonlegendary Elemental. If you don't, tap it and put a stun counter on it if it doesn't have any. It loses all abilities until it untaps.

card.name: Royalty's Will
card.text: Discard your hand, then draw three cards. Harmonize {4}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: Time Stands Still
card.text: Target creature you control gains haste and trample until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to any target. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Abyssal Trespass
card.text: Create a 6/6 blue Leviathan creature token with hexproof. If you would draw a card from a empty library, you may instead cast this spell from your graveyard without paying it's mana cost.

card.name: Visor Blast
card.text: Choose one— • Visor Blast deals 1 damage to each creature you don't control. • Visor Blast deals X damage to target creature, where X is the number of creatures on the battlefield plus one.
